significance.day_significance_en:
"The Day of the Hundred Sacred Peaceful and Wrathful Deities"

Confession of Negative Actions (Digpa Shagpa): As it is the final day of the month, it is a day for purifying and confessing the non-virtuous actions committed throughout that month.
Restoration and Purification (Sojong): It is also the day when the monastic community (Sangha) gathers to perform the "Sojong" ritual, a ceremony for restoring vows and purifying transgressions according to the Vinaya (monastic discipline).

auspicious_day.short_description_en: A day of introspection and renewal, traditionally used for purification practices and restoring commitments.

events.name_en: Birthday. of Kyabje Yangshi Dungse Gyana ta Rinpoche
events.details_en:
Long Life Prayer for the Dungse Gyana Ta Reincarnation of Kyabje Dungse Thinley norbu Rinpoche

OM SWASTI | TSE LHA RIG DZIN GYA TSOY NGO WO NYID 
Om Swasti! You are the very essence of the ocean of Longevity Deities and Vidyadharas.
CHI ME TSO KYE DOR JE JIN LAP KYI 
Through the blessings of the Deathless Lake-Born Vajra (Guru Rinpoche),
DUNG SE JNA NA KAL GYAR ZHAB TEN CHING May the lotus feet of Dungse Jnana remain firm for hundreds of eons,
LAP CHEN TEN DROY DZAY PA THAR CHIN SHOK 
And may your vast enlightened activities for the teachings and beings be perfectly fulfilled!
~ At the persistent request of Lama Ösel Dorje Namgyal Wangdu, this prayer was written by one who bears the name of the Dudjom Tulku, Sangye Pema Zhepa. It was composed on the 10th day of the Tibetan month in the Wood-Horse year of the 17th Rabjung cycle. May these aspirations be meaningfully realized
